what_it_does: Stores a posted noticeboard note in the dragnet-development channel, authored by Tim via claude_code, that contains a "[section]" marker and the one-line body "This is section 1", and links as a comment on board://item-a49f74ee.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, type=note, source=claude_code, state=posted, title="Tim · section", author_session=tim, channel=dragnet-development.
A single link of kind "commented_on" points to board://item-a49f74ee.
The markdown body is just "[section]" followed by "This is section 1".
created and updated timestamps are identical.
The file declares no code symbols.
standouts: The bracketed "[section]" marker in the body.
The commented_on link to another board item.
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter and a markdown body.
Uses a board:// URI as the item address and for link targets.
Records state transitions in a history list.
concerns: The body is extremely terse and lacks local context for what "section 1" refers to.
The title is generic and does not describe the note's subject.
The commented_on target is not resolved within this file.
notes: A terse noticeboard note by Tim marking "section 1" and commenting on item-a49f74ee in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What document or topic does "section 1" belong to?
What is the content of the target item-a49f74ee?
Why was this filed by claude_code under Tim's session?
What semantic role does the "[section]" tag intend to signal?
apparent_themes: Lightweight channel memory for human-authored fragments.
Structured metadata for attribution and state tracking.
intention_signals: It appears to capture a small content fragment (a section heading and first section text) as a comment on another noticeboard item, likely for incremental documentation or discussion in a development channel.
novelty: The body uses a bracketed "[section]" tag as a lightweight structural marker, and the title encodes both author and a generic content type.
contribution: It preserves a timestamped, attributed micro-note linked to item-a49f74ee and carrying a labeled section fragment, useful as a discussion atom in channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: A posted noticeboard note by Tim in dragnet-development, linked as a comment on board://item-a49f74ee, containing a "[section]" marker and the text "This is section 1".
intention_for_embedding: To record a short section fragment as a comment on another noticeboard item.
